rationale: The citing paper explicitly builds on self-construal theory (independent vs. interdependent) and claims to introduce a new mechanism within self-construal research, while the cited 2012 JMR paper is itself centered on self-construal interactions and mechanism (perspective taking). Given this clear construct-level overlap and plausible theory-source role, this does not look like an obvious incidental mention, even though the raw match evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry.
